contexts.context: ...he says,however odd that the belief may seem to <mark>oneself</mark>.        Between constructing a private fantsayfantasy world for oneself...
...oneself.        Between constructing a private fantsayfantasy world for <mark>oneself</mark> alone and writing poetry,there is,of course,a profound difference...
